text.message: Why don't we just give the game to blue already
Black you really had to take 6-3-11 to stop blue
no chance of getting that spot
I mean when you placed your initial placements
I had NO idea black would just take the port lmfao
My spot was fine to go to port honestly
Black you also think about the spots you leave behind for the other players
not going to cost my game for a chance of someone winning sorry
I mean I thought I was fine until port was taken so not much I can do honestly
Same, now that OJ blocked me, I can't do much either
So this is a natural victory for blue
orange is complaining when he's on every resource 8 different numbers
you have a hell of a setup
I’m not faking anything, wasn’t thinking you went port and I changed what I have to do
you take brick port and dominate
We’ll see but that’s the goal it’ll take a while without port
was asking you for a NB
yeah you'll crush us soon orange
I only got 3 but had to use it
need to make sure blue doesn't take amry
blue you might want to extend road because orange will take it and by at 9
he can win next turn actually
you settled, so you had a road
I mean I’m on 8 this is far from over lol
Oh yea it’s over then gg
Didn’t even get to use second mini
tried to keep army but no one wanted to trade
